name: Georgia Institute of Technology
notes: ACC program with strong STEM academic profile. Women's program consistently competitive in the conference.

name: Purdue University
notes: Big Ten women's soccer program. Strong engineering school with a competitive athletic environment.

name: Seton Hall University
notes: Catholic university in the Big East metro New York area. Men's and women's soccer compete in a strong conference.

name: Villanova University
notes: Prestigious Catholic university near Philadelphia. Strong academics, Big East competition, and an active alumni network in the Philadelphia metro area.

name: Xavier University
notes: Jesuit university in Cincinnati competing in the Big East. Balances competitive soccer with strong academic standards.

name: Butler University
notes: Small private university in Indianapolis with Big East soccer. Known for a strong campus culture and solid academic programs.

name: DePaul University
notes: Urban Catholic university in Chicago competing in the Big East. Women's soccer program has been particularly active in recruiting.

name: George Mason University
notes: Large public university near Washington D.C. Men's soccer program has produced professional players and consistently competes in the A-10.

name: Fordham University
notes: Jesuit university in New York City. Combines a strong academic reputation with access to the NYC soccer talent pool.

name: University of Dayton
notes: Catholic university in Ohio with a strong athletic tradition. Women's soccer program competes well in the Atlantic 10.

name: University of Rhode Island
notes: New England public university competing in the Atlantic 10. Draws talent from the strong New England soccer pipeline.

name: La Salle University
notes: Catholic university in Philadelphia. Atlantic 10 soccer with access to one of the country's richest soccer recruiting markets.

name: George Washington University
notes: Private research university in the nation's capital. Strong academics and Atlantic 10 soccer in one of the country's top soccer markets.

name: University of Massachusetts Amherst
notes: Flagship Massachusetts public university. Men's program has historically been nationally ranked. Strong New England recruiting base.

name: University of Richmond
notes: Small private university near Richmond. Combines strong academics with competitive A-10 soccer and generous financial aid.

name: Duquesne University

name: Colorado State University
notes: Large public university in northern Colorado. Mountain West soccer program near the Denver metro recruiting market.

name: United States Air Force Academy
notes: Service academy near Colorado Springs. Full scholarship (room, board, tuition) for all cadets. Requires military commitment after graduation. Both men's and women's soccer compete in the Mountain West.

name: San Diego State University
notes: Major public university in San Diego. Mountain West soccer with access to one of the richest soccer talent markets in California.

name: San Jose State University
notes: Public university in Silicon Valley. Mountain West soccer in a region with deep soccer talent from youth club programs.

name: California State University, Fresno

name: Boise State University

name: University of Nevada

name: University of Wyoming
notes: Wyoming's only Division I program. Mountain West soccer at high altitude. Women's program is more established than men's.

name: Utah State University
notes: Northern Utah public university. Mountain West women's soccer; men's soccer also competes at D1 level.

name: University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa
notes: The only D1 program in Hawaii. Competing in the Mountain West. Unique recruiting profile attracting Pacific Rim and international talent. Travel is a significant logistical consideration.

name: California Polytechnic State University
notes: Prestigious public polytechnic on California's central coast. Big West soccer with one of the highest average GPAs in public D1 soccer.

name: California State University, Fullerton

name: California State University, Bakersfield

name: California State University, Northridge

name: California Baptist University
